name: fix: Footer redesign — hierarchy, clarity & visual separation

tasks.name: Apply footer layout structure: 3-col grid + footer top separator
tasks.acceptance: cd '/Users/thuylenguyenmai/Desktop/Projects/Cuối tuần đi đâu/weekend-go-web' && grep -q 'grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3' index.html && grep -q '<footer id="contact" class="bg-footer-bg text-white border-t border-white/10"' index.html && echo 'T-01 PASS'

tasks.name: Apply typography hierarchy: section labels, link contrast, studio credit, copyright
tasks.acceptance: cd '/Users/thuylenguyenmai/Desktop/Projects/Cuối tuần đi đâu/weekend-go-web' && grep -q 'text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-500 mb-5' index.html && grep -q 'text-gray-300 hover:text-white' index.html && grep -q 'Sản phẩm của' index.html && ! grep -q '\-\-\-\- Một sản phẩm của' index.html && grep -q 'text-gray-600 text-xs' index.html && echo 'T-02 PASS'

tasks.name: Apply interactive affordances: social pill buttons + promoted 'Về chúng tôi'
tasks.acceptance: cd '/Users/thuylenguyenmai/Desktop/Projects/Cuối tuần đi đâu/weekend-go-web' && [ $(grep -c 'w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/15' index.html) -ge 3 ] && grep -q 'Về chúng tôi' index.html && ! grep -q 'border-t border-gray-700 pt-5' index.html && echo 'T-03 PASS'
